values.description: Backend base URL. Change to Raspberry Pi IP if testing on device.
Must match ADMIN_WALLET env var in backend .env.
A wallet registered as a trusted issuer in IssuerRegistry on Sepolia.
Any wallet NOT in IssuerRegistry. Used as credential holder and unauthorized requester.
Set by generate-test-sig.js BEFORE every Newman run. Fresh signature for the current nonce. Do NOT request a new nonce after setting this.
Auto-set by CRED-01 pre-request script. Timestamp-based ref_id generated fresh each run to avoid duplicate key errors.
Auto-set by CRED-04 pre-request script. Timestamp-based batch ref_id.
Auto-set by CRED-04 pre-request script. Timestamp-based batch ref_id.
Auto-set by CRED-04 pre-request script. Timestamp-based batch ref_id.
Auto-set by CRED-01 test script from body.ref_id. Used by CRED-09, 10, 11, 12, QR-01, SEC-04.
Auto-set by QR-01 test script. Used by QR-02. Valid for ~30 seconds.
MANUAL STEP: After Newman run, run QR-01 in Postman GUI, wait 30+ seconds, paste the token here. Used by QR-03 and SEC-06.
Auto-set by API-TPL-02 test script from body.template.id. Used by API-TPL-03.
Internal — auto-set and auto-cleared by CRED-05 pre-request script. 51-item batch payload.
